{{CargoRelic
|name=AI Disturbance Detector
|class_id=20851
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=Club Store
|description=Your trusted companion for getting lost in prospection! Uses cutting-edge algorithms to misinterpret threats, crash during critical scans, and blame human error. Perfect for researchers who love surprise adrenaline rushes.
|fame=19
|art=14
|fth=14
|civ=14
|tech=29
|ss1=Prospector Kit gives Troop Casualty -4%<br>Prospector Kit gives Resource Gathering SPD +1%
|ss2=Prospector Kit gives Troop Casualty -7%<br>Prospector Kit gives Resource Gathering SPD +2%
|ss3=Prospector Kit gives Troop Casualty -10%<br>Prospector Kit gives Resource Gathering SPD +3%
|ss4=prop@56036_2<br>prop@56035_2
|ss7=prop@56036_2<br>prop@56035_2<br> (Awakened)
}}
